---
title: "Fiona Houser"
image: IMG_0177.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
  - icon: github
    text: Github
    href: https://github.com/fhouser7
  - icon: linkedin
    text: Linkedin
    href: www.linkedin.com/in/fiona-houser-50a4b0353
---

Hello! My name is Fiona Houser and this is my personal website/portfolio made for GEOG 490. I am a fourth year student at the University of Oregon, double majoring in Spatial Data Science (SDS) and Spanish. I am originally from Portland.

I enjoy/am interested in these parts of my GEOG classes: ...

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
